parameters.content:
### 📄 Apex — Document Upload (v2)
This workflow receives files from the external HTML form at /upload-document, validates them, uploads to Google Drive, and confirms via Slack.

**Webhook URL Format:**
https://YOURINSTANCE.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/upload-document

### SETUP CHECKLIST
1. Copy webhook URL from Webhook node and paste into upload_form.html `WEBHOOK_URL` variable.
2. Configure Google Drive OAuth2 credential.
3. Invite Slack bot to #admin.
4. Activate workflow BEFORE testing the form.

### ⚠️ Security Note
This webhook has no authentication by default.

For production, add a shared secret header check in the Validate Upload node, or enable n8n webhook authentication in settings.
